src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.general_idea: Add Javadoc comment block to the main application class to specify the author.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.human_impl: Added /** @Autor Nidhal Naffati */ before the class declaration.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.general_idea: Adjust indentation of the main method to use spaces instead of tabs for consistent code style.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.human_impl: Changed indentation from tabs to 4 spaces for the main method body.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Add org.hibernate.validator.constraints import to support validation annotations in the new Jakarta environment.
Add Jackson annotation import to handle JSON serialization issues like infinite recursion.
Add @Builder annotation to enable the Builder pattern for object construction.
Change ID field from primitive long to wrapper Long to support nullability and better ORM integration.
Switch ID generation from AUTO to SEQUENCE with a specific generator configuration for database compatibility.
Add length validation constraints to the name field.
Add unique and nullable constraints to the registration number field.
Add not-null constraints to seats, kilometres, and doors fields.
Replace string-based model field with a typed Enum for type safety and consistency.
Replace string-based gear field with a typed Enum for type safety and consistency.
Replace string-based fuel field with a typed Enum for type safety and consistency.
Add ManyToOne relationship to Dealer entity with JSON back-reference to prevent recursion.
Define the Model enum values within the Car entity class.
Define the Gear enum values within the Car entity class.
Define the Fuel enum values within the Car entity class.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.4 to 3.2.1 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new com.mysql:mysql-connector-j required for Spring Boot 3.
Replace explicit jakarta.validation-api dependency with the standard spring-boot-starter-validation.
Add Flyway MySQL dependency for database migration management.
Add Flyway Maven plugin to execute database migrations during the build process.
Add Jackson JSR310 datatype support for Java 8+ date/time API serialization.
Add Spring Boot Mail starter dependency for email functionality.
Explicitly add JUnit Jupiter dependency for modern JUnit 5 testing.
Add JUnit 4 dependency, likely for legacy test compatibility or specific vintage engine usage.
Add Spring Context Support dependency, often needed for specific mail or resource handling utilities.
Remove Thymeleaf starter as the project appears to be moving towards a pure REST API architecture.
Update the project artifact version from snapshot to a release version.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Updated the database connection URL to use a new database name and removed legacy JDBC parameters.
Removed unnecessary quotes from the database password configuration.
Changed Hibernate DDL auto strategy from 'update' to 'validate' to enforce schema consistency with migrations.
Switched Hibernate dialect from MySQL8Dialect to the generic MySQLDialect.
Enabled SQL formatting in Hibernate properties for better readability in logs.
Removed Thymeleaf configuration block as it is no longer used or required.
Added Flyway configuration to manage database migrations explicitly.
Configured the server to exclude stack traces from error responses for security and cleanliness.
